detectors.description:
Takeoff.sendETHToFee(uint256) (Takeoff.sol#571-575) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (Takeoff.sol#573)
detectors.markdown:
[Takeoff.sendETHToFee(uint256)](Takeoff.sol#L571-L575) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Takeoff._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Takeoff.sol#463-527):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Takeoff.sol#503)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Takeoff.sol#541-553)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Takeoff.sol#509)
		- _feeAddrWallet.transfer(amount) (Takeoff.sol#573)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Takeoff.sol#525)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Takeoff.sol#665)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Takeoff.sol#645)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Takeoff.sol#647)
	Takeoff._rOwned (Takeoff.sol#247) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Takeoff._takeTeam(uint256) (Takeoff.sol#659-667)
	- Takeoff._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Takeoff.sol#641-655)
	- Takeoff.balanceOf(address) (Takeoff.sol#381-385)
	- Takeoff.constructor() (Takeoff.sol#323-345)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (Takeoff.sol#525)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Takeoff.sol#673)
	Takeoff._rTotal (Takeoff.sol#263) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Takeoff._getCurrentSupply() (Takeoff.sol#765-775)
	- Takeoff._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Takeoff.sol#671-677)
	- Takeoff.constructor() (Takeoff.sol#323-345)
	- Takeoff.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Takeoff.sol#437-445)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Takeoff.openTrading() (Takeoff.sol#605-629):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (Takeoff.sol#615)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Takeoff.sol#617)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (Takeoff.sol#617)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (Takeoff.sol#625)
	Takeoff.tradingOpen (Takeoff.sol#297) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Takeoff.openTrading() (Takeoff.sol#605-629)
